titleStmt.title: SII 23.48: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 48. (A.R. No. 48 of 1907.) Tiruviśalūr, Kumbakonam Taluk, Tanjavur District Śivayōganātha temple—on the same wall Konērinmaikōṇḍāṉ

summary.p: This registers a royal order issued in the 30th year and 110th day of the king's reign from his palace at Kāñchīpuram, to the nāṭṭār (assembly) of Maṇṇi-nāḍu a division of Rājēndraśiṅga-vaḷanāḍu, the elders of the brahmadēya and the several residents of the village who had the rights of vēḷāṉvagai, dēvadāna, paḷḷichchanda and kaṇimuṟṟūṭṭu. Being incomplete the object of the inscription is not clear. It mentions the purchase from the sabhā of Tiruviśalūr of a block of wet land measuring 24(3/4) and odd vēli by the chief Araiyaṉ Rājarājaṉ alias Madhurāntaka-Iḷaṅgōvēḷāṉ. Its produce as estimated and settled by the assembly is given as 1181 kalam and odd of paddy. Reference is made to a revenue survey of the lands, as a result of which this land is said to have accrued to the assembly and was probably endowed to the temple by the chief, after its purchase. The title of the chief who was evidently of the Koḍumbāḷūr family seems to indicate that the king was Rājēndra-Chōḷa I.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
... svastī śrī . koneriṉmaikoṇṭāṉ rājentraciṅkavaḷanāṭṭu maṇṇi nāṭṭu nāṭṭārkkum brahmate
yakkiḻavaṟkum veḷḷānvakaiyum tevatāṉam paḷḷiccantak kaṇimuṟ ṟūṭṭu veṭṭappeṟu paḻavaṟac cālāpo
kam Uḷḷiṭṭa Ūrkaḷilārkkum namakku yāṇṭu muppatāvatu nāḷ nūṟṟorupatināl kāñcipurattu nam viṭṭil Uḷḷāl cit
tiramaṇṭapattu rājentracoḻabrahmādhirāja nil nām Uṇṇuviruntu rājentira ciṅkavaḷanāṭṭu maṇṇināṭṭu coḻamāttāṇṭa
c caruppetimaṅkalattu Aḷantapaṭi niṅkal niṅkal nikki nirnilattil Oru pakkam Aṭaiya Ivvūr cavaiyārpakkal Arai
yaṉ rājarājanāṉa maturāntaka Iḷaṅkoveḷāṉ vilaikkuk koṇṭu ṭaiya nirnilam Irupattu nālemukkāle
muṉṟu mākkāṇi muntirikaik kiḻkāle muntirikaik kiḻ muṉṟu mākā ṇiyum Innilattāl Ivvūr cavaiyār taramiṭṭa taravopāti vanta nel
lu Āyirattu nūṟṟeṇpattoru kalane Irutūṇippatak korunāḻi Uriyum Ivvūril yāṇṭu 3 10Āvatu mutal tarukkiveIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 23.48 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
